calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-03-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that notice is sufficient. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 6, 2015 is admitted to probate. Britta Peterson-McCutchen is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 11, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
